V-M-001.checks: Backend config and DB initialization remain runnable; auth and crypto helpers still load. Default secret_key is rejected with ValueError. DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY is required. Token blacklist functions work with Redis and degrade gracefully without it. All datetime values are timezone-aware. Email settings include Resend provider configuration without secret leakage. MTProto provisioning settings validate domain, port, secret, salt, SNI prefix, and rotation marker; blank optional MTProto secret env values normalize to missing config instead of crashing app import.
V-M-001.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py tests/test_mtproto_provisioning.py -v

phase-36-verification.check-1: Settings accepts EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend, non-empty RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_API_URL=https://api.resend.com/emails, EMAIL_FROM=noreply@krotpn.xyz, and EMAIL_VERIFICATION_URL_BASE=https://krotpn.xyz/verify-email.
phase-36-verification.check-2: Blank Resend API key fails closed before live registration can later hit provider_disabled.
phase-36-verification.check-3: Settings validation errors and log-friendly summaries must never include RESEND_API_KEY or full verification URLs.
phase-36-verification.command-1: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py -v

scenarios.scenario: App refuses to start with default secret_key
All datetime comparisons use timezone-aware values
Blacklisted token is rejected by verify_token_with_blacklist

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-10: Full backend/tests/test_security.py passed, 12 tests including Phase-25 blacklist additions.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-14: Phase-29 target pytest exercised MTProto Settings construction through provisioning tests.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-05-17: Clean VPS backend unhealthy hotfix added blank MTProto env normalization coverage.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 planning added Resend deploy configuration expectations for EMAIL_PROVIDER, RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_API_URL, EMAIL_FROM, and verification URL base.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-05-17: Phase-36 local verification passed Resend Settings validation through backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py and scripts/phase36-resend-deploy-smoke.mjs.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 py_compile and backend suite passed for TRIAL_DAYS default four-day trial policy and compatibility migration helpers.
